title: NBTUltimate
description: A library made for making items with NBT with some NBT features that are not possible to be activated on a specific item.
body:
# About: 
**NBT Ultimate is a datapack that adds more NBT options to items with tags, prebuild functions to get or auto build already made stuff, more item modifiers and functions for enchantments and more. 
Datapack created by inon13**
View the [Wiki](https://github.com/inon-13/NBTUltimate/wiki) for more info on the features
